creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Tue, May 09, 2000 at 10:56:10AM -0700, tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:
> Now gtkGL can be removed from ports tree, sinse original source archive 
> hasn't been fetchable from its master site for long time, and no other 
> ports use this port.

Wrong.  gtkglarea, fsv, and xtraceroute depend on gtkgl.  Besides, I've got
local copies of the gtkGL distfile and probably could host it somewhere.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
